nav.aiGovDesc: Our framework for transparent and compliant AI.

shortcut.text: Identify regulatory gaps instantly and match with vetted local experts for seamless execution.

actionPlan.text: Translate local fragmentation into a clear roadmap. We help you understand faster and decide safer.

experts.text: Stop guessing. Get your customized assessment and connect with the right partner firm immediately.

services.title: What we cover, whoever you are

founder.title: For Founders & CEOs
founder.description: Scale into new markets without the legal overhead. Get instant clarity on tax, VAT, and corporate structure before you commit.

ops.title: For Operations & Expansion
ops.description: De-risk your supply chain and product launches. Navigate complex EPR packaging rules, marketing standards, and operational compliance.

advisors.title: For In-House Counsel
advisors.description: Stop manually tracking global regulatory drift. Use our AI-mapped intelligence to oversee 27+ jurisdictions from a single dashboard.

partners.title: For Partner Firms
partners.description: Receive highly qualified, pre-structured client dossiers. Focus on high-value expert execution rather than tedious initial discovery calls.

snapshot.description: Complete transparency on how we process your data, integrate live sources, and deliver the perfect expert match.
snapshot.feature1Desc: Public footprints, operational metadata, and target market jurisdictions.
snapshot.feature2Desc: No PII, no sensitive financials. All inputs are strictly anonymized.
snapshot.bannerDesc: Structured AI dossiers eliminate costly "discovery hours" and map your exact footprint to the right local expert, saving weeks of back-and-forth.
snapshot.card1Desc: Regulatory signals grounded in official government APIs.
snapshot.card2Desc: Standardized legal brief format expected by top-tier firms.
snapshot.card3Desc: Faster response times from vetted compliance partners compared to traditional discovery.

step1.title: Assessment
step1.body: Our AI scans your target footprint and flags exact regulatory gaps instantly.

step2.title: Dossier
step2.body: A structured, anonymised legal brief with all mandatory registrations and operational shifts.

step3.title: Matching
step3.body: We algorithmically pair your dossier with pre-vetted local partners who know your gaps.

step4.title: Appointment
step4.body: Book a strategy call directly with an expert who already understands your case.

step5.title: Execution
step5.body: Your partner executes registrations, filings, and structural setups locally.

stepper.description: Our 5-step funnel ensures you don't just identify the problem — you solve it with the right local experts immediately.

uspItems.title: Proactive, not reactive
uspItems.body: Stop manually searching for regulations. CompliHub360 maps your business context to a prioritised, country-specific action plan — before you face a penalty.
bullets: Prioritised obligations, not a raw law dump

uspItems.title: Privacy-first by architecture
uspItems.body: Your sensitive corporate data — names, emails, tax IDs — never leaves your browser unstructured. Local AI models redact all PII before any analysis reaches our servers.
bullets: Local PII redaction before cloud processing
Zero raw PII stored on our servers
UK GDPR & CCPA compliant by design

uspItems.title: End-to-end orchestration
uspItems.body: We manage the full compliance lifecycle — from self-assessment to vetted expert matching. Our automated SLA watchdog tracks provider responses so you are never left waiting.

aiEngine.title1: From raw context to a structured
aiEngine.description: Our privacy-first AI pipeline has three stages — each designed to maximise output quality while minimising your data exposure.

aiSteps.title: Smart Context Ingestion
aiSteps.body: The AI translates your unstructured business context into a validated structured schema — extracting entity type, industry, revenue bands, and market intent.

aiSteps.title: Live Validations
aiSteps.body: Local AI models strip all Personally Identifiable Information — names, emails, tax IDs, phone numbers — before the anonymised schema is passed to the mapping engine.

aiSteps.title: Dossier Generation & Matching
aiSteps.body: The engine cross-references your anonymised profile with live country-specific risk matrices and produces a structured dossier matched to vetted local experts.

servicesZone.description: Each domain is mapped to country-specific requirements and updated as regulations change.
servicesZone.ctaCardDesc: Our Full Support package covers all six domains with a dedicated compliance manager and a unified action plan.

heroZone.description: Navigate Tax & VAT obligations and EPR requirements with precision. Translate regulatory fragmentation into a structured Action Plan — in max. 5 steps.
heroZone.ctaSub: No account required · Results in under 3 minutes
heroZone.cardDesc: Select your market and category to receive a personalised compliance dossier.

valueProgression.title1: The more you share, the more
valueProgression.description: Start for free as a Guest. Register to unlock your full Action Plan. Join as a Partner to receive qualified leads.

footer.description: Your intelligent compliance compass. Navigate global regulatory complexity with AI-driven precision and a privacy-first architecture.
footer.privacyBadge: Privacy-first · No PII stored without consent

resolution.description: You have your risk profile. Now fix it. Here is what a typical UK expansion dossier looks like — and the three paths to resolving it.

findings.title: Key Findings
findings.item3Title: MTD for VAT — Digital Records Gap
findings.item3Desc: Phase 2 compliance gap in current workflow

unlock.title: You have your risk profile.
unlock.subtitle: Choose how you want to resolve it.

resolution.disclaimer: Expert Match connects you with a verified local tax or legal specialist who executes the action plan on your behalf.

u1.name: Sarah K.
u1.quote: We saved 3 weeks of legal research in 30 minutes. CompliHub360 flagged our EPR packaging obligation early. The structured dossier was sent to our solicitor the same day, preventing a €20k compliance penalty.

u2.name: Marcus L.
u2.quote: Navigating post-Brexit UK GDPR differences was stalling our enterprise deals. CompliHub360 gave us a grounded, cited analysis we could defend in front of our board. We closed our biggest deal 40% faster.

u3.name: Elena R.
u3.quote: We were expanding into Germany. The AI mapped exactly what was needed for a subsidiary versus a branch, saving us over €15k in consulting fees and 2 months of waiting for preliminary legal advice.

u4.name: David P.
u4.quote: The speed at which CompliHub360 mapped our product against FCA thresholds was astonishing. Having live references to legislation built immense trust, allowing us to launch our UK pilot 3 months ahead of schedule.

engagementModal.title: Request Proposal from {{providerName}}
engagementModal.detailsPlaceholder: Add any specific requirements, timelines, or context for the provider...
engagementModal.privacyNotice: Protected by AI Privacy Gate. Your request is anonymized until you choose to reveal your identity to the provider.

founders.title: From Regulatory Uncertainty to Confident Expansion
founders.body: Founders need speed and clarity — not academic legal explanations. CompliHub360 translates regulatory chaos into safe, actionable business decisions so you can scale across borders without surprises.
founders.pain1Desc: Expanding internationally? VAT thresholds, EPR packaging laws, and GDPR differ by country. One missed registration can mean fines.
founders.pain2Desc: Cold-emailing compliance providers and waiting weeks for vague replies is not a strategy. It's a liability.
founders.pain3Desc: Our AI Wizard captures your context in 4–5 steps, maps jurisdiction-bound risks, and connects you to SLA-enforced specialists within 24–48h.

operations.title: Centralize, Track & Master Compliance Ops
operations.body: Operations managers and agency operators need structured knowledge and a unified system — not scattered government sites and chaotic email threads. CompliHub360 gives you a single control center for cross-border compliance.
operations.card1Problem: Information on advertising restrictions, EPR, and tax laws is fragmented across unstructured government sites.
operations.card1Solution: Our Knowledge Hub aggregates source-backed laws, tutorials, and guides — all tailored to your exact search profile.
operations.card2Problem: Tracking provider requests, saved sessions, and legal updates is chaotic without a unified system.
operations.card2Solution: The Dashboard Control Center lets you save sessions, track engagement statuses in real-time, and monitor tasks.
operations.card3Problem: Summarizing regulatory exposure for stakeholders is manual, time-consuming work.
operations.card3Solution: One-click PDF export: Risk Snapshot, Action Plan, and Source Index — ready for internal circulation.

counsel.title: Defensible Intelligence. Secure Orchestration.
counsel.body: Legal professionals demand strict data privacy and zero AI hallucinations. CompliHub360 is a secure, EU-AI-Act ready infrastructure layer that accelerates legal research and safely structures external mandates.
counsel.benefit1Desc: Every summary, risk label, and tip is directly backed by links to official, validated legal sources and authorities. No invented claims.
counsel.benefit2Desc: Documents pass through a local PII Redaction Pipeline. Names, emails, and phone numbers are masked before any AI processing.
counsel.benefit3Desc: Replace vague emails with structured compliance dossiers sent to verified local counsel — accelerating the mandate process.

cta.title: Which role fits you?
cta.body: No matter your function — our platform adapts to your compliance reality.

engine.title: From Regulatory Uncertainty to Structured Action
engine.body: Compliance data is fragmented and unstructured. Our AI acts as a cognitive Advisory Layer — extracting your business intent and mapping it to concrete legal realities. No hallucinations. Every output grounded in verified sources.
engine.card1Body: You don't need to know which laws to search for. Our Wizard captures your context in 4–5 steps and generates a structured Search Profile automatically.
engine.card2Body: Before any document touches our AI, it passes through a local Redaction Pipeline — automatically masking PII like names, emails, and phone numbers.
engine.card3Body: The AI only activates if three strict conditions are met: document is sanitized, user has given explicit consent, and it's not classified as restricted.

matching.title: Verified Specialists. Orchestrated Accountability.
matching.body: We're not a directory. We're an orchestrator. We don't just give you a list of names — we control the engagement to ensure accountability, from first contact to successful resolution.
matching.step1Desc: Connects you only with specialists verified for your target country and compliance category.
matching.step2Desc: Your anonymized compliance dossier is sent directly to the partner — no cold emails, no blank inquiries.
matching.step3Desc: Partners must confirm receipt within 24h and reply within 48h. Our automated Watchdog enforces this.
matching.step4Desc: Repeated SLA breaches trigger an automatic downgrade. You only engage with responsive, top-tier professionals.
matching.step5Desc: High-performing partners earn priority placement and premium badges through our Ranking Engine.

coverage.title: Localized Security for Global Expansion
coverage.body: Your business crosses borders — your compliance should too. Every question, risk, and matched expert is tailored to the laws of your target market.
coverage.matrixBody: Data privacy laws differ across borders. Our platform adapts data residency, retention, and AI eligibility rules per jurisdiction — defaulting to strict GDPR standards for European markets.

partners.title: Pre-Qualified Clients. Zero Friction.
partners.body: Stop wasting billable hours on unqualified leads and unstructured cold emails. CompliHub360 sends you highly qualified, structured business clients ready to act.
partners.benefit1Desc: Receive business context, target markets, and specific regulatory risks — evaluate mandates instantly.
partners.benefit2Desc: Secure, time-bound one-click access. No portal to maintain, no password to remember.
partners.benefit3Desc: Transparent flat engagement fee. Great SLA performance earns priority placement and premium badges.

cta.title: Ready to simplify compliance?
cta.body: Start your free assessment and get a structured risk profile in under 2 minutes.

compliance.heroTitle: Find Your Regulatory Challenge. Start Here.
compliance.heroBody: Each compliance area is a gateway to your specific assessment. Identify your topic, understand the risks, and get matched with a verified specialist — all in under 5 minutes.

tax.title: Tax & VAT
tax.headline: Cross-Border VAT, Delivery Thresholds & Digital Taxation
tax.description: Managing cross-border VAT obligations, delivery thresholds, and digital taxation rules across international jurisdictions — including OSS and MTD frameworks.
tax.affected: Cross-border e-commerce operators selling physical or digital products via marketplaces (Amazon) or independent shops (Shopify).
tax.ob2: Determining when local VAT registration becomes mandatory
tax.ob3: Navigating varying tax rules for physical vs. digital goods
tax.cov1: Dedicated Tax & VAT Wizard — captures sales model, legal seat, revenue, and target markets
tax.cov3: Orchestrates matching to specialized VAT consultants by case complexity

epr.title: EPR & Packaging
epr.headline: Extended Producer Responsibility, VerpackG & Recycling Targets
epr.description: Highly fragmented local environmental regulations, packaging laws (VerpackG), and recycling targets (PRN) that differ drastically by country.
epr.affected: E-commerce merchants, manufacturers, resellers, and dropshippers selling physical goods with packaging across borders.
epr.ob2: Determining registration by product category (electronics, apparel, cosmetics)
epr.ob3: Adhering to local recycling targets to avoid fines
epr.cov1: Product & Packaging Wizard — assesses commercial role, target markets, product categories
epr.cov3: Intelligent edge-case handling: "Assume Yes" safety logic for uncertain dropshippers

privacy.title: Data & Privacy
privacy.headline: GDPR, UK GDPR, Cookie Compliance & Data Transfers
privacy.description: Compliance with EU DSGVO (GDPR), UK GDPR, cookie consent management, and the strict regulations governing international data transfers.
privacy.affected: Software founders, SaaS expansion managers, and businesses collecting personal data or using tracking tools while expanding globally.
privacy.ob2: Legally securing international data transfers (EU ↔ US)
privacy.ob3: Managing tracking tool compliance (GA4, Meta, TikTok)
privacy.cov1: Data & Privacy Wizard — analyzes target customers, processing locations, tracking stack
privacy.cov2: Calculates privacy_risk_level based on actual tool exposure
privacy.cov3: Platform itself uses a local PII Redaction Pipeline — zero raw data in AI layer

corporate.title: Corporate Structure
corporate.headline: International Company Setup, Legal Form & Local Substance
corporate.description: Navigating international company setup, choosing the correct legal form, establishing local substance, and handling corporate registrations in new jurisdictions.
corporate.affected: Individuals or companies planning to register legal entities, expand teams, or establish corporate presence in foreign markets.
corporate.ob1: Selecting appropriate corporate structure per target country
corporate.cov1: Corporate & Structure Wizard — evaluates current status, desired markets, team complexity
corporate.cov3: Intelligent routing to educational guide paths for uncertain founders

cta.title: Not sure which area applies?
cta.body: Our Wizard asks the right questions and routes you to the correct assessment automatically.

stories.title: Real Compliance Outcomes, Not Marketing Claims
stories.body: See how businesses like yours used CompliHub360 to navigate complex cross-border compliance — from uncertainty to resolution.

guides.title: Knowledge That Builds Compliance Confidence
guides.body: In-depth market deep-dives, regulatory breakdowns, and practical checklists — curated by our compliance intelligence engine and reviewed by specialists.
guides.kbBody: Every platform update, new compliance rule, or partner integration triggers a dedicated content update. Our guides are evergreen — automatically maintained and verified against the latest regulatory sources.

cta.title: Ready to become compliant?
cta.body: Join businesses that turned compliance uncertainty into structured action plans.

advisory.heroTitle: Your intelligent compliance compass: The cognitive
advisory.heroBody: Translating unstructured regulatory uncertainty into clear, actionable understanding. We bridge the gap between your business and the complex legal world.
advisory.featuresBody: Going far beyond a traditional directory, our Advisory Layer operates as a cognitive OS for global compliance.
advisory.feature1Desc: Intent Structuring: Instead of static filters, our wizard captures your specific business context in 4-5 dynamic steps, translating uncertainty into a structured search profile.
advisory.feature2Desc: Data security is built into the architecture. All PII is automatically and locally anonymized before any AI analysis, ensuring no confidential data ever leaves your control.
advisory.feature3Desc: Our AI is strictly grounded in official, validated legal sources. Every recommendation and summary includes direct links to the regulatory documentation it's based on.
advisory.feature4Desc: Continuous risk calculation based on your profile inputs. Connects your context with our database to generate curated checklists and verified provider matches.
advisory.transparencyTitle: Transparency and limits of our AI
advisory.transparencyQuote: "Our AI does not replace your lawyer. It makes your lawyer 10x more efficient by providing perfectly pre-structured digital dossiers."
advisory.check1: Focus on structured orientation & dossier orchestration.
advisory.check2: Grounded retrieval from official, validated sources.
advisory.cross1: No binding legal advice—that belongs to licensed law firms.
advisory.matrixBody: Every data process follows a strict individual policy matrix matched to local data residency and privacy standards.
advisory.pipelineNote: Your AI never sees plaintext PII. Local extraction only.
advisory.ctaBody: Stop searching through static directories. Start navigating your compliance journey with our cognitive intelligent operating system.

complexity.intentLabel: WHAT DO YOU NEED RIGHT NOW?

wizard.reviewDesc: Confirm everything looks right before we generate your results.

aiGov.heroDesc: We believe in responsible innovation. Our platform integrates AI strictly within the bounds of global regulations, ethics, and transparency. Discover how we implement the 6 dimensions of AI Governance.
aiGov.dimDesc: A comprehensive approach to building trustworthy AI systems for enterprise compliance.
aiGov.dimEthicsDesc: Our AI features respect human autonomy and are designed to augment professionals, not replace them. We prevent systemic bias through continuous monitoring.
aiGov.dimTranspDesc: Users deserve to know when they are interacting with AI. Every AI-generated output on CompliHub360 is clearly marked, and its data sources are traceable.
aiGov.dimOrgDesc: Clear governance pipelines dictate who can deploy, access, and audit AI features. We maintain comprehensive audit logs for all AI interactions.
aiGov.dimTechDesc: Our infrastructure ensures zero downtime and resilient fallbacks. Dedicated Privacy Gates sanitize all inputs before they reach any LLM.
aiGov.dimRegDesc: Built for the EU AI Act and ISO 42001. We map global standards directly into our Code, prioritizing strict EU and UK privacy rules.
aiGov.dimRiskDesc: Continuous risk assessment of AI models. We classify features by risk tiers (e.g., EU AI Act High-Risk vs. Minimal-Risk) and apply proportional security controls.
aiGov.featDesc: How we leverage AI today, wrapped in our strict governance framework.
aiGov.featPrivacyDesc: Before any business context is analyzed, our local NLP models strip out all Personally Identifiable Information (PII). Emails, names, and phone numbers never leave our secure European servers.
aiGov.featIntentDesc: Transforms unstructured client input into a structured risk profile. The AI is restricted to analyzing compliance context and cannot make binding legal decisions on its own.
aiGov.featGateDesc: Every AI action must pass three checks: Data Sanitization, Explicit Consent, and Domain Restriction. If any check fails, the workflow gracefully falls back to a deterministic, non-AI process.
